caption: In a classroom setting, several people are seated at tables, including two women wearing blue scrubs who are engaged in conversation and looking at a laptop. A large presentation screen in the background displays a list of names and professional credentials, including "University of Maryland School of Medicine, Maryland Advanced Simulation, Training, Research and Innovation (MASTRI) Center" and "R Adams Cowley Shock Trauma Center for Critical Care & Trauma Education." The text lists various individuals such as "Kerry Murphy, DVM," "Katie Gordon, MSN, RN, CNE," "Jessyca Bortelli, BSN, RN, CAPA," and "Kelly Gregory, BSN, RN," alongside military ranks like "TSgt." and "MSgt." A large QR code is visible on the screen. As the sequence progresses, the camera angle shifts slightly, and the on-screen text updates, though the core group of people and the general environment remain the same.
